front: Opera: verismo opera by Umberto Giordano; set during the French Revolution; ends with the title poet and his lover Maddalena both going to the guillotine
Opera: opens with Gerard adjusting furniture as his father sings 'Son sessant'anni' about a lifetime of servitude; spy 'Incredibile' sees through Bersi's disguise at the Café Hottot
Opera: soprano aria in which Maddalena describes her mother's death and offers herself to Gerard to save Andrea; the Maria Callas recording was used in the film Philadelphia
Opera: tenor aria ('L'Improvviso') in which Andrea describes a field of violets against a blue sky and contrasts nature's beauty with the suffering of the lower classes; opens with a solo cello on G#
Opera: baritone aria in which Gerard questions his own motives after signing the denunciation of Andrea
